roadmap_items: Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer (In Progress), specifically the A2UI action-order canonicalization task - define the A2UI output contract for agent-produced presentation artifacts, add deterministic schemas, provide CLI rendering fallback for the same structured payloads, and keep the surface client-agnostic.
scope_goal: Canonicalize materialized A2UI action order in src/qual/ui/a2ui.py so CLI fallback rendering stays deterministic, and keep the handoff aligned with ROADMAP.md Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer and PRODUCT_VISION.md Capability 5, Agent-to-UI protocol (A2UI), specifically the action-order canonicalization task and CLI fallback contract.
tasks_completed: Updated the A2UI materialization path in src/qual/ui/a2ui.py to sort filtered actions by canonical JSON before rendering.
Added contract coverage in tests/unit/test_a2ui_contract.py to verify the canonical ordering behavior for materialized action payloads.
Rewrote the lane metadata and packet artifacts to make the roadmap and vision mapping explicit in the required handoff fields.
Kept the lane record scoped to one source file plus matching tests with no routing or provider impact.
vision_capabilities: Capability 5: Agent-to-UI protocol (A2UI), specifically the capability that agent-emitted structured presentation artifacts (cards, sections, actions, metadata) remain consumable by CLI first, then Exegesis Console, then future Studio UI.
